JHIN-WHISPER.title: Whisper
JHIN-WHISPER.description: At the start of each combat, gain 4 [gold]Bullets[/gold]. When [gold]Flourish[/gold] triggers, increase this attack's damage by 50%. If the target's HP is below 25%, deal 6 additional damage.
JHIN-WHISPER.flavor: Every pull of the trigger is a pursuit of perfection.
